title: croton eluteria
intro: Croton eluteria, also known as the Chinese croton or Chinese lacquer tree, is a deciduous shrub native to Southeast Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Croton eluteria include treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, and is also used as a source of lacquer, a natural adhesive made from its sap.
